title: [SCFToCalyx] Add support for building combinational logic [5/13]
body:
This commit adds support for building `ComponentOp`'s and  most combinational operators from the `std` dialect. The combinational operators are built through the `buildLibOp` function. Here, we instantiate a new Calyx primitive, create a combinational group, and assign the input ports of the calyx primitive with the operands of the source operation.

No new tests; `ComponentOp`s are required to have a non-empty control schedule, and we're still a few commits from that.
